changelog: kills every extra thread. Voice, wake word, assistant, browser, music—each now has a master switch. Turn off what you do not want, keep what you need. No root required; all controls work on locked devices. New real screen power switch: tap to black the display, tap again to wake. Identity finally honest—a voice terminal stays a voice terminal, a browser panel stays a browser panel, a music box stays a music box. Nothing runs hidden. Nothing wastes battery. Upgrade and strip it down.
